papers.title: Calibeating Prediction-Powered Inference
papers.abstract: We study semisupervised mean estimation with a small labeled sample, a large unlabeled sample, and a black-box prediction model whose output may be miscalibrated. A standard approach in this setting is augmented inverse-probability weighting (AIPW) [Robins et al., 1994], which protects against prediction-model misspecification but can be inefficient when the prediction score is poorly aligned with the outcome scale. We introduce Calibrated Prediction-Powered Inference, which post-hoc calibrates the prediction score on the labeled sample before using it for semisupervised estimation. This simple step requires no retraining and can improve the original score both as a predictor of the outcome and as a regression adjustment for semisupervised inference. We study both linear and isotonic calibration. For isotonic calibration, we establish first-order optimality guarantees: isotonic post-processing can improve predictive accuracy and estimator efficiency relative to the original score and simpler post-processing rules, while no further post-processing of the fitted isotonic score yields additional first-order gains. For linear calibration, we show first-order equivalence to PPI++. We also clarify the relationship among existing estimators, showing that the original PPI estimator is a special case of AIPW and can be inefficient when the prediction model is accurate, while PPI++ is AIPW with empirical efficiency maximization [Rubin et al., 2008]. In simulations and real-data experiments, our calibrated estimators often outperform PPI and are competitive with, or outperform, AIPW and PPI++. We provide an accompanying Python package, ppi_aipw, at https://larsvanderlaan.github.io/ppi-aipw/.
papers.chineseTitle: 校准预测驱动的推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在小规模有标签样本、大规模无标签样本以及输出可能未校准的黑箱预测模型下的半监督均值估计问题。在此背景下，一种标准方法是增强逆概率加权（AIPW）[Robins等人，1994]，该方法能抵御预测模型误设，但当预测分数与结果尺度不匹配时效率可能较低。本文引入了校准预测驱动的推断，该方法在用于半监督估计之前，先在有标签样本上对预测分数进行后验校准。这一简单步骤无需重新训练，既能提高原始分数作为结果预测器的性能，也能作为半监督推断的回归调整。本文研究了线性和等渗校准两种方法。对于等渗校准，本文建立了其一阶最优性保证：等渗后处理可相对于原始分数和更简单的后处理规则提高预测准确性和估计效率，而对拟合的等渗分数进行进一步后处理不会带来额外的一阶增益。对于线性校准，本文展示了其与PPI++的一阶等价性。本文还阐明了现有估计量之间的关系，表明原始PPI估计量是AIPW的特例，当预测模型准确时可能效率低下，而PPI++则是具有经验效率最大化的AIPW[Rubin等人，2008]。在模拟和真实数据实验中，本文的校准估计量通常优于PPI，且与AIPW和PPI++相比具有竞争力或更优。本文提供了一个配套的Python包ppi_aipw，可在https://larsvanderlaan.github.io/ppi-aipw/获取。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出校准预测驱动的推断，提高半监督均值估计效率。

papers.title: Flexible Bayesian Models for Time-Varying Income Distributions
papers.abstract: Survey data are widely used to study how income inequality, poverty, and welfare evolve over time. A common practice is to estimate the income distribution separately for each year, treating annual observations as independent cross-sections. For population subgroups with relatively small sample sizes, however, this approach can produce unstable parameter estimates, imprecise inference for inequality and poverty measures, and potentially misleading posterior probabilities of Lorenz and stochastic dominance. This paper develops flexible Bayesian models for time-varying income distributions that borrow strength across adjacent years by allowing the parameters of income distributions to evolve dynamically. We consider a random walk specification and an extended model with shrinkage priors. The proposed framework yields coherent inference for the full income distributions over time, as well as for associated inequality measures, poverty indices, and dominance probabilities. Simulation studies show that, relative to independent year-by-year models, the proposed approach produces substantially more precise and stable inference, while avoiding spurious variation in welfare comparisons. An application to the Aboriginal and residents of the Australian Capital Territory (ACT) population subgroups in the Household, Income and Labour Dynamics in Australia survey shows that the dynamic models deliver improved inference for income distributions and related welfare measures, and can change conclusions about distributional dominance over time.
papers.chineseTitle: 时变收入分布的灵活贝叶斯模型
papers.chineseAbstract: 调查数据被广泛用于研究收入不平等、贫困和福利如何随时间演变。常见做法是分别估计每年的收入分布，将年度观测视为独立的横截面。然而，对于样本量相对较小的群体，这种方法可能导致参数估计不稳定、对不平等和贫困指标的推断不精确，以及洛伦兹和随机优势的后验概率可能产生误导。本文开发了时变收入分布的灵活贝叶斯模型，通过允许收入分布参数动态演变，从而在相邻年份间借用力量。我们考虑了随机游走规范和具有收缩先验的扩展模型。所提出的框架为整个时期的收入分布以及相关的不平等指标、贫困指数和优势概率提供了连贯的推断。模拟研究表明，与独立的逐年模型相比，所提出的方法产生了更精确和稳定的推断，同时避免了福利比较中的虚假变化。对澳大利亚家庭、收入和劳动力动态调查中澳大利亚首都领地（ACT）的原住民和居民子群体的应用表明，动态模型为收入分布和相关福利指标提供了改进的推断，并可能改变对随时间分布优势的结论。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 开发动态贝叶斯模型，改进时变收入分布推断。

papers.title: Participation and Representation in Local Government Speech
papers.abstract: Local government meetings are the most common formal channel through which residents speak directly with elected officials, contest policies, and shape local agendas. However, data constraints typically limit the empirical study of these meetings to agendas, single cities, or short time horizons. We collect and transcribe a massive new dataset of city council meetings from 115 California cities over the last decade, using advanced transcription and diarization techniques to analyze the speech content of the meetings themselves. We document two sets of descriptive findings: First, city council meetings are frequent, long, and vary modestly across towns and time in topical content. Second, public participants are substantially older, whiter, more male, more liberal, and more likely to own homes than the registered voter population, and public participation surges when topics related to land use and zoning are included in meeting agendas. Given this skew, we examine the main policy lever municipalities have to shift participation patterns: meeting access costs. Exploiting pandemic-era variation in remote access, we show that eliminating remote options reduces the number of speakers, but does not clearly change the composition of speakers. Collectively, these results provide the most comprehensive empirical portrait to date of who participates in local democracy, what draws them in, and how institutional design choices shape both the volume and composition of public input.
papers.chineseTitle: 地方政府会议中的参与与代表性
papers.chineseAbstract: 地方政府会议是居民与当选官员直接对话、质疑政策以及影响地方议程的最常见正式渠道。然而，数据限制通常将此类会议的实证研究局限于议程、单一城市或短期时间范围内。本文收集并转录了过去十年中来自115个加州城市的市议会会议的大量新数据集，利用先进的转录和说话人分割技术来分析会议本身的发言内容。本文记录了两组描述性发现：首先，市议会会议频繁、冗长，且在不同城镇和时间上的主题内容变化不大。其次，与注册选民群体相比，公众参与者明显年龄更大、白人更多、男性更多、更自由派，且更有可能拥有住房，当会议议程中包含土地使用和分区相关议题时，公众参与度会激增。鉴于这种偏差，本文研究了市政当局改变参与模式的主要政策杠杆：会议准入成本。利用疫情期间远程访问的变化，本文表明取消远程选项会减少发言者数量，但不会明显改变发言者的构成。总体而言，这些结果提供了迄今为止关于谁参与地方民主、什么吸引他们参与以及制度设计选择如何影响公众意见的数量和构成的最为全面的实证描述。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究创新性显著，方法规范但非前沿，实证充分，影响力较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 揭示地方政府会议参与者的特征及制度设计对参与的影响。

papers.title: Nonparametric Point Identification of Treatment Effect Distributions via Rank Stickiness
papers.abstract: Treatment effect distributions are not identified without restrictions on the joint distribution of potential outcomes. Existing approaches either impose rank preservation -- a strong assumption -- or derive partial identification bounds that are often wide. We show that a single scalar parameter, rank stickiness, suffices for nonparametric point identification while permitting rank violations. The identified joint distribution -- the coupling that maximizes average rank correlation subject to a relative entropy constraint, which we call the Bregman-Sinkhorn copula -- is uniquely determined by the marginals and rank stickiness. Its conditional distribution is an exponential tilt of the marginal with a Bregman divergence as the exponent, yielding closed-form conditional moments and rank violation probabilities; the copula nests the comonotonic and Gaussian copulas as special cases. The empirical Bregman-Sinkhorn copula converges at the parametric $\sqrt{n}$-rate with a Gaussian process limit, despite the infinite-dimensional parameter space. We apply the framework to estimate the full treatment effect distribution, derive a variance estimator for the average treatment effect tighter than the Fréchet--Hoeffding and Neyman bounds, and extend to observational studies under unconfoundedness.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过秩粘性非参数点识别处理效应分布
papers.chineseAbstract: 在不对潜在结果的联合分布施加限制的情况下，处理效应分布是无法识别的。现有方法要么施加秩保持这一强假设，要么推导出通常较宽的部分识别边界。本文表明，单个标量参数——秩粘性，足以在允许秩违反的情况下实现非参数点识别。所识别的联合分布——即在相对熵约束下使平均秩相关性最大化的耦合，我们称之为Bregman-Sinkhorn连接函数——由边际分布和秩粘性唯一确定。其条件分布是边际分布的指数倾斜，指数为Bregman散度，从而得出封闭形式的条件矩和秩违反概率；该连接函数将共单调和正态连接函数作为特例。尽管参数空间是无限维的，但经验Bregman-Sinkhorn连接函数以参数√n的速率收敛于高斯过程极限。我们将该框架应用于估计完整的处理效应分布，推导出比Fréchet-Hoeffding和Neyman边界更紧的平均处理效应方差估计量，并将其扩展到无混杂假设下的观察性研究。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，对计量经济学有较大影响，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出秩粘性参数，实现处理效应分布的非参数点识别。

papers.title: How damaging is zero-sum thinking to an agent's interests when the world is positive-sum?
papers.abstract: We study whether zero-sum decision rules, maximin and minimax, harm agents' interests in positive-sum strategic environments relative to Nash equilibrium behavior or, more generally, than best response behaviour. Contrary to an influential evolutionary view, we give illustrations where maximin serves an agent's interests better than Nash equilibrium behaviour. We also show that these illustration are not atypical or idiosyncratic because, in our main result, the class of such games where a maximin profile strictly Pareto dominates all Nash equilibria has the same cardinality as the class of games in which a Nash equilibrium strictly Pareto dominates all maximin profiles. Thus, neither behavior is generally superior. We further identify additional mechanisms favoring maximin over Nash equilibrium, including coordination failures under multiple equilibria, where maximin can outperform Nash play in realised-pay-off terms. A systematic analysis of strictly ordinal symmetric 3x3 games shows that these effects arise with non-trivial frequency. Our findings, therefore, suggest that the observed rise in zero-sum thinking in many rich countries, when associated with a maximin decision rule, will not be readily displaced through its generation of inferior pay-offs.
papers.chineseTitle: 当世界为正和博弈时，零和思维对个体利益的损害有多大？
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在正和博弈的战略环境中，零和决策规则（最大最小和最小最大）是否会损害个体的利益，与纳什均衡行为或更一般的最佳反应行为相比。与一种有影响力的进化观点相反，我们举例说明在某些情况下，最大最小规则比纳什均衡行为更能维护个体的利益。我们还表明，这些例子并非不典型或特殊，因为我们的主要结果显示，最大最小策略严格帕累托优于所有纳什均衡的游戏类别，与纳什均衡严格帕累托优于所有最大最小策略的游戏类别具有相同的基数。因此，没有一种行为普遍优越。我们进一步确定了有利于最大最小而非纳什均衡的其他机制，包括在多重均衡下的协调失败，其中最大最小在实际支付方面可以优于纳什均衡。对严格序对称3x3博弈的系统分析表明，这些效应以非微不足道的频率出现。因此，我们的发现表明，在许多富裕国家观察到的零和思维的上升，当与最大最小决策规则相关联时，不会因其产生的劣等支付而轻易被取代。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新颖观点，方法论规范但缺乏前沿性，实证较扎实但非非常出色，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 零和思维在正和博弈中不一定损害个体利益。

papers.title: Post-AGI Economies: Autonomy and the First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics
papers.abstract: The First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics assumes that welfare-bearing agents are autonomous and implicitly relies on a binary distinction between autonomy and instrumentality. Welfare subjects are those who have autonomy and therefore the capacity to choose and enter into utility comparisons, while everything else does not. In post-AGI economies this presupposition becomes nontrivial because artificial systems may exhibit varying degrees of autonomy, functioning as tools, delegates, strategic market actors, manipulators of choice environments, or possible welfare subjects. We argue that the theorem ought to be subject to an autonomy qualification where the impact of these changes in autonomy assumptions is incorporated. Using a minimal general-equilibrium model with autonomy-conditioned welfare, welfare-status assignment, delegation accounting, and verification institutions, we set out conditions for which autonomy-complete competitive equilibrium is autonomy-Pareto efficient. The classical theorem is recovered as the low-autonomy limit.
papers.chineseTitle: 后AGI经济：自主性与福利经济学第一基本定理
papers.chineseAbstract: 福利经济学第一基本定理假定，承载福利的个体是自主的，并隐含地依赖于自主性与工具性之间的二元区分。福利主体是那些具有自主性、因此有能力进行选择并参与效用比较的个体，而其他一切则不具备这些特征。在后AGI（通用人工智能）经济中，这一前提变得不再简单，因为人工系统可能表现出不同程度的自主性，它们可以作为工具、代表、战略市场参与者、选择环境的操纵者或潜在的福利主体。我们主张，该定理应受到自主性条件的限制，其中应纳入这些自主性假设变化的影响。我们使用一个包含自主性条件福利、福利状态分配、委托核算和验证机构的最小一般均衡模型，设定了自主性完全竞争均衡是自主性帕累托有效的条件。经典定理被恢复为低自主性极限。
keywords: 福利经济学第一基本定理
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新颖的自主性条件限制，方法严谨，但实证不足，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出后AGI经济中自主性条件限制下的福利经济学新定理。

papers.title: Recent Advances in Causal Analysis of the Stochastic Frontier Model
papers.abstract: Causal inference methods (instrumental variables, difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, etc.) are primary tools used across many social science milieus. One area where their application has lagged however, is in the study of productivity and efficiency. A main reason for this is that the nature of the stochastic frontier model does not immediately lend itself to a causal framework when interest hinges on an error component of the model. This paper reviews the nascent literature on attempts to merge the stochastic frontier literature with causal inference methods. We discuss modeling approaches and empirical issues that are likely to be relevant for applied researchers in this area. This review shows how this model can be easily put within the confines of causal analysis, reviews existing work that has already made inroads in this area, addresses challenges that have yet to be met and discusses core findings.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机前沿模型的因果分析新进展
papers.chineseAbstract: 因果推断方法（如工具变量、双重差分、回归断点等）是许多社会科学领域的主要工具。然而，在生产力和效率研究领域，这些方法的应用却相对滞后。主要原因是，当研究兴趣集中在模型的误差成分上时，随机前沿模型的性质并不立即适用于因果分析框架。本文回顾了将随机前沿文献与因果推断方法相结合的初步文献。我们讨论了可能对该领域应用研究者相关的建模方法和实证问题。这篇综述展示了如何将该模型轻松纳入因果分析的范畴，回顾了在这一领域已经取得进展的现有工作，解决了尚未克服的挑战，并讨论了核心发现。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 综述随机前沿模型与因果推断结合的新进展及挑战。

papers.title: Fair Commodity Taxation
papers.abstract: We study economies where consumers interact independently with many monopolists. When consumer valuations over goods are correlated, correlation can distort the induced distribution of consumer surplus (information rents). We identify which shifts in the correlation structure over values makes the induced distribution more or less fair, in the sense of second order stochastic dominance. We then investigate the role taxation can have on information rents, and show the tax authority never benefits from randomizing the allocation of goods. We characterize the set of mechanisms that are on the fairness-efficiency frontier under regularity conditions on the distribution of types. Furthermore, under these conditions all allocations on the fairness-efficiency frontier ration the good more than an unregulated monopolist. Finally, we discuss implications of our model for luxury commodity taxation.
papers.chineseTitle: 公平的商品税收
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了消费者独立与多个垄断者进行交互的经济体。当消费者对商品的估值存在相关性时，这种相关性可能会扭曲消费者剩余（信息租金）的诱导分布。我们确定了价值相关性结构中的哪些变化会使诱导分布变得更公平或更不公平，这里的公平指的是二阶随机占优。接着，我们探讨了税收对信息租金的作用，并表明税务机关从随机分配商品中无法获益。在类型分布的常规条件下，我们刻画了处于公平-效率前沿的机制集合。此外，在这些条件下，公平-效率前沿上的所有分配都比不受监管的垄断者更合理地分配商品。最后，我们讨论了我们的模型对奢侈品税收的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 研究商品税收中公平与效率的权衡及影响。

papers.title: On Rent Dissipation in Dynamic Multi-battle Contests
papers.abstract: We study dynamic multi-battle contests and examine how the contest structure shapes dynamic incentives and determines the extent of rent dissipation. A discouragement effect often arises -- such as in tug-of-war and best-of-$K$ contests -- preventing full rent dissipation even when the series can extend infinitely. We identify a structural property, exchangeability, that contributes to the effect. Leveraging this insight, we establish a necessary and sufficient condition for almost-full rent dissipation. As an application, we introduce the iterated incumbency contest, which illustrates how volatility in the surrounding environment sustains dynamic incentives and generates almost-full rent dissipation, and thus offers insights into various competitive phenomena.
papers.chineseTitle: 动态多阶段竞赛中的租金耗散研究
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了动态多阶段竞赛，并探讨了竞赛结构如何塑造动态激励并决定租金耗散的程度。在诸如拔河比赛和最佳K轮竞赛等情境中，常常会出现一种抑制效应，即使系列赛可以无限延伸，也能防止租金完全耗散。我们识别出一种结构特性——可交换性，它有助于产生这种效应。利用这一洞见，我们建立了几乎完全租金耗散的充要条件。作为应用，我们引入了迭代在位竞赛，该竞赛展示了周围环境的不稳定性如何维持动态激励并产生几乎完全的租金耗散，从而为各种竞争现象提供了见解。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证稍弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出动态多阶段竞赛中租金耗散的充要条件，并引入迭代在位竞赛模型。

papers.title: From Clerks to Agentic-AI: How will Technology Change Labor Market in Finance?
papers.abstract: Financial firms have gone through three major technological waves: computerization in the 1980s and 1990s, the rise of indexing and passive investing in the 2000s and 2010s, and the AI and automation wave from roughly 2015 to the present. This project studies how much labor is required to manage capital across those waves by tracking a simple productivity measure: assets under management per employee. Using a small panel of representative firms, we compare changes in AUM per employee, revenue per employee, and operating expense intensity over time. The goal is not to identify causal effects, but to document stylized facts about how technology changes the scale of asset management work.
papers.chineseTitle: 从职员到智能体AI：技术将如何改变金融劳动力市场？
papers.chineseAbstract: 金融公司经历了三次主要的技术浪潮：20世纪80年代和90年代的计算机化，21世纪头十年和2010年代的指数化和被动投资兴起，以及大约从2015年至今的人工智能和自动化浪潮。本项目通过追踪一个简单的生产力指标——每位员工管理的资产规模，来研究在这些技术浪潮中管理资本所需的劳动力数量。我们使用了一个由代表性公司组成的小型面板数据集，比较了每位员工管理的资产规模、每位员工的收入以及运营费用强度随时间的变化。研究目标不是确定因果关系，而是记录技术如何改变资产管理工作的规模这一风格化事实。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究视角新颖，但创新性略显不足；方法规范，实证较扎实，影响有限，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 研究技术变革对金融劳动力市场的影响，记录资产管理规模变化。

papers.title: Convex Duality in Perturbed Utility Route Choice
papers.abstract: This paper develops a highly general convex duality framework for the perturbed utility route choice (PURC) model. We show that the traveler's constrained, potentially non-smooth utility maximization problem admits a dual formulation: an unconstrained concave maximization problem with a differentiable objective. The unique optimal flow can be recovered link-by-link from any dual solution via the convex conjugates of link perturbation functions. These properties enable efficient gradient-based optimization for large-scale networks and fast computation for sensitivity analysis. Finally, the framework reveals a structural analogy between PURC and current flow in electrical circuits.
papers.chineseTitle: 扰动效用路径选择中的凸对偶性
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文为扰动效用路径选择（PURC）模型构建了一个高度通用的凸对偶框架。我们证明了旅行者在约束条件下、可能非平滑的效用最大化问题存在一个对偶表述：一个无约束的凹最大化问题，其目标函数可微。通过链路扰动函数的凸共轭，可以从任何对偶解中逐链路恢复唯一的最优流。这些特性使得基于梯度的优化方法能够高效应用于大规模网络，并加速敏感性分析的计算。最后，该框架揭示了PURC模型与电路中电流流动之间的结构相似性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 提出PURC模型的凸对偶框架，揭示其与电路电流的相似性。

papers.title: Causal Persuasion
papers.abstract: We propose a model of causal persuasion, in which a sender selectively discloses a set of variables together with their true joint distribution and proposes a subjective causal model that binds them. A receiver is persuaded by this model only if the data conclusively identifies the causal link of interest. We characterize when such persuasion succeeds or fails, and how easily it can be achieved. We further show that if the receiver holds a pre-existing subjective model, debunking it is similar to persuading a receiver without one. To establish a true causal link, the sender often needs to disclose only one or two well-chosen variables. But to dispel a perceived link -- to persuade the receiver there is no causal relationship -- every common cause must be disclosed. Our results highlight a fundamental asymmetry in causal persuasion: Establishing causality is often much easier than ruling it out.

papers.title: Optimal linear-payment auction design with aftermarket collaboration
papers.abstract: This paper studies optimal auction design when valuations depend endogenously on post-auction collaboration between the seller and the winning bidder. Both parties exert non-contractible efforts after the auction, generating a double moral hazard problem alongside adverse selection. We analyze two role structures -- winner-pivotal and seller-pivotal collaboration -- and characterize optimal direct mechanisms using linear payment schemes that combine cash transfers with proportional value sharing. The optimal mechanism allocates the asset to the bidder with the highest virtual surplus, employs a deterministic value-sharing rule, and achieves full type revelation through the signal realization rule. Comparing the two scenarios yields three main findings. First, regarding value sharing, the seller secures a strictly higher share under seller-pivotal collaboration: for sufficiently low-type winners, the seller extracts the entire value, whereas under winner-pivotal collaboration every winner must retain a positive share to sustain his critical effort. Second, regarding effort exertion, the pivotal party always exerts higher post-auction effort than the supporting party, and each party exerts greater effort when pivotal than when providing support. Third, seller-pivotal collaboration yields strictly higher seller revenue than winner-pivotal collaboration for any type distribution. Finally, these optimal mechanisms can be implemented through ascending auctions with endogenously determined linear contracts.
papers.chineseTitle: 考虑拍卖后合作的线性支付最优拍卖设计
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了当估值内生地依赖于拍卖后卖方与中标者之间的合作时，最优拍卖设计的问题。拍卖后双方均付出不可合约化的努力，从而产生双重道德风险问题以及逆向选择问题。本文分析了两种角色结构——中标者关键合作与卖方关键合作，并使用结合现金转移与比例价值共享的线性支付方案来刻画最优直接机制。最优机制将资产分配给具有最高虚拟剩余的投标者，采用确定性的价值共享规则，并通过信号实现规则实现完全类型揭示。比较两种情景得出三个主要发现。首先，在价值共享方面，卖方在卖方关键合作下获得严格更高的份额：对于类型足够低的中标者，卖方提取全部价值，而在中标者关键合作下，每个中标者必须保留正份额以维持其关键努力。其次，在努力付出方面，关键方总是比支持方付出更高的拍卖后努力，且当为关键方时，各方付出的努力大于作为支持方时。第三，对于任何类型分布，卖方关键合作产生的卖方收入严格高于中标者关键合作。最后，这些最优机制可以通过具有内生确定线性合同的升价拍卖来实现。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在拍卖设计领域有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出了考虑拍卖后合作的线性支付最优拍卖设计框架。

papers.title: How damaging is zero-sum thinking to an agent's interests when the world is positive-sum?
papers.abstract: We study whether zero-sum decision rules, maximin and minimax, harm agents' interests in positive-sum strategic environments relative to Nash equilibrium behavior or, more generally, than best response behaviour. Contrary to an influential evolutionary view, we give illustrations where maximin serves an agent's interests better than Nash equilibrium behaviour. We also show that these illustration are not atypical or idiosyncratic because, in our main result, the class of such games where a maximin profile strictly Pareto dominates all Nash equilibria has the same cardinality as the class of games in which a Nash equilibrium strictly Pareto dominates all maximin profiles. Thus, neither behavior is generally superior. We further identify additional mechanisms favoring maximin over Nash equilibrium, including coordination failures under multiple equilibria, where maximin can outperform Nash play in realised-pay-off terms. A systematic analysis of strictly ordinal symmetric 3x3 games shows that these effects arise with non-trivial frequency. Our findings, therefore, suggest that the observed rise in zero-sum thinking in many rich countries, when associated with a maximin decision rule, will not be readily displaced through its generation of inferior pay-offs.
papers.chineseTitle: 当世界是正和博弈时，零和思维对参与者利益的损害有多大？
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在正和博弈的战略环境中，零和决策规则（最大最小化和最小最大化）是否会损害参与者的利益，与纳什均衡行为或更一般的最佳反应行为相比。与一种有影响力的进化观点相反，我们给出了最大最小化比纳什均衡行为更有利于参与者利益的例子。我们还表明，这些例子并非不典型或特殊，因为我们的主要结果显示，最大最小化策略严格帕累托优于所有纳什均衡的游戏类别，与纳什均衡严格帕累托优于所有最大最小化策略的游戏类别具有相同的基数。因此，没有一种行为普遍优越。我们进一步确定了有利于最大最小化而非纳什均衡的其他机制，包括在多重均衡下的协调失败，其中最大最小化在实现收益方面可以优于纳什均衡。对严格序对称3x3博弈的系统分析表明，这些效应以非微不足道的频率出现。因此，我们的研究结果表明，在许多富裕国家观察到的零和思维的上升，当与最大最小化决策规则相关联时，不会因其产生的劣等收益而轻易被取代。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新颖观点，方法论规范，实证较扎实，对理论经济学有较大影响，且清晰易懂。
papers.summary: 揭示了零和思维在正和博弈中的复杂影响，挑战了传统观点。

papers.title: Clustered Local Projections for Time-Varying Models
papers.abstract: We propose a clustered local projection (clustered LP) method to estimate impulse response functions in a class of time-varying models where parameter variation is linked to a low-dimensional matrix of observables. We show that the clustered LP recovers the conditional average response when the driving variables are exogenous and a weighted average of the conditional marginal effects when they are endogenous. We propose an iterative estimation method that first classifies the data using k-means, estimates impulse response functions via GMM, and evaluates differences across clustered LP estimates. Our Monte Carlo simulations illustrate the ability of clustered LP to approximate the conditional average response function. We employ our technique to examine how uncertainty influences the transmission of a contractionary monetary policy shock to the 5- and 10-year U.S. nominal Treasury yields. Our estimation results suggest macroeconomic and monetary policy uncertainty operate through complementary but distinct channels: the former primarily amplifies the risk compensation embedded in the term premium, while the latter governs the speed and persistence with which markets revise their expectations about the future rate path following a monetary policy shock.
papers.chineseTitle: 时变模型中的聚类局部投影法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种聚类局部投影（clustered LP）方法，用于估计一类时变模型中的脉冲响应函数，其中参数变化与低维可观测矩阵相关联。我们证明了当驱动变量为外生时，聚类局部投影法能够恢复条件平均响应；而当驱动变量为内生时，则能够恢复条件边际效应的加权平均。我们提出了一种迭代估计方法，该方法首先使用k均值对数据进行分类，然后通过广义矩估计（GMM）估计脉冲响应函数，并评估聚类局部投影估计之间的差异。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，聚类局部投影法能够很好地近似条件平均响应函数。我们将该技术应用于研究不确定性如何影响紧缩性货币政策冲击对美国5年期和10年期名义国债收益率的传导。估计结果表明，宏观经济不确定性和货币政策不确定性通过互补但不同的渠道发挥作用：前者主要放大了期限溢价中嵌入的风险补偿，而后者则控制了货币政策冲击后市场对未来利率路径预期的修正速度和持续性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法创新且严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱，影响力待观察。
papers.summary: 提出聚类局部投影法，研究时变模型中不确定性对货币政策传导的影响。

papers.title: Subsample-based Estimation under Dynamic Contamination
papers.abstract: Subsample-based estimation is a standard tool for achieving robustness to outliers in econometric models. This paper shows that, in dynamic time series settings, such procedures are fundamentally invalid under contamination, even under oracle knowledge of contamination locations. The key issue is that contamination propagates through the model's residual filter and distorts the estimation criterion itself. As a result, removing contaminated observations does not, in general, restore the uncontaminated objective or ensure consistency. We characterise this failure as a structural incompatibility between pointwise subsampling and residual propagation. To address it, we propose a propagation-compatible transformation of index sets, formalised through a patch removal operator that removes the residual footprint of contamination. Under suitable conditions, the proposed operator leaves the estimator asymptotically unchanged under the uncontaminated model, while restoring consistency for the clean-data parameter under contamination. The results apply to a broad class of residual-based estimators and show that valid subsample-based estimation in dynamic models requires explicit control of residual propagation.
papers.chineseTitle: 动态污染下的子样本估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 子样本估计是在计量经济模型中实现对外生异常值鲁棒性的标准工具。本文表明，在动态时间序列环境中，即使知道污染位置，此类方法在污染情况下也从根本上无效。关键问题在于污染会通过模型的残差滤波传播，并扭曲估计准则本身。因此，移除受污染的观测值通常无法恢复未受污染的目标或确保一致性。我们将这种失败描述为点式子采样与残差传播之间的结构不兼容。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种对索引集进行传播兼容变换的方法，通过补丁移除算子来消除污染的残差足迹。在适当条件下，所提出的算子在未受污染的模型下使估计量保持渐近不变，同时在污染情况下恢复干净数据参数的一致性。结果适用于广泛的基于残差的估计量，并表明在动态模型中进行有效的子样本估计需要明确控制残差传播。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，影响力较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出传播兼容变换解决动态污染下子样本估计失效问题。

papers.title: Causal inference for social network formation
papers.abstract: This paper develops a framework for identification, estimation, and inference on the causal mechanisms driving endogenous social network formation. Identification is challenging because of unobserved confounders and reverse causality; inference is complicated by questions of equilibrium and sampling. We leverage repeated observations of a network over time and random variation in initial ties to address challenges to causal identification. Our design-based approach sidesteps questions of sampling and asymptotics by treating both the set of nodes (individuals) and potential outcomes as non-random. We apply our approach to data from a large professional services firm, where new hires are randomly assigned to project teams within offices. We estimate the causal effect on tie formation of indirect ties, network degree, and local network density. Indirect ties have a strong and significant positive effect on tie formation, while the effects of degree and density are smaller and less robust.
papers.chineseTitle: 社交网络形成的因果推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于识别、估计和推断驱动内生社交网络形成的因果机制。由于存在未观察到的混杂因素和反向因果关系，识别过程颇具挑战性；而由于涉及均衡和抽样问题，推断过程也变得复杂。本文利用网络随时间重复观测的数据以及初始联系的随机变化，来应对因果识别方面的挑战。我们的基于设计的方法通过将节点（个体）集合和潜在结果均视为非随机变量，从而避开了抽样和渐近性的问题。我们将此方法应用于一家大型专业服务公司的数据，其中新员工被随机分配到办公室内的项目团队。我们估计了间接联系、网络度数和局部网络密度对联系形成产生的因果效应。结果表明，间接联系对联系形成具有显著且强烈的正向影响，而度数和密度的影响则较小且不够稳健。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在因果推断框架上有显著创新，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出新框架识别社交网络形成的因果机制。

papers.title: Factor-Augmented Panel Regressions and Variance-Weighted Treatment Effects
papers.abstract: We revisit panel regressions with unobserved heterogeneity through the lens of variance-weighted average treatment effects. Building on established results for cross-sectional OLS and one-way fixed effects panels, we show that two-way panel estimators with latent factors, specifically the principal components estimator of Greenaway-McGrevy, Han and Sul (2012) and the interactive fixed effects estimator of Bai (2009), also converge to interpretable estimands under fully nonparametric assumptions. Both estimators consistently estimate the same variance-weighted average of unit-time-specific treatment effects, where the weights are proportional to the conditional variance of the regressor given the unobserved heterogeneity. The result requires the number of estimated factors to grow with the sample size and applies to the single regressor case. We discuss the challenges that arise when extending to multiple regressors and to inference.
papers.chineseTitle: 因子增强面板回归与方差加权处理效应
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文通过方差加权平均处理效应的视角重新审视了具有未观测异质性的面板回归。基于横截面OLS和单向固定效应面板的既定结果，我们证明了具有潜在因子的双向面板估计量，特别是Greenaway-McGrevy、Han和Sul（2012）的主成分估计量和Bai（2009）的交互固定效应估计量，在完全非参数假设下也收敛到可解释的估计量。这两个估计量一致地估计了单位时间特定处理效应的相同方差加权平均值，其中权重与给定未观测异质性的回归变量的条件方差成比例。这一结果要求估计的因子数量随样本量增加，并适用于单一回归变量的情况。我们讨论了扩展到多个回归变量和进行推断时面临的挑战。
keywords: 方差加权平均处理效应
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论上有一定创新，实证较扎实，但扩展性讨论略显不足。
papers.summary: 双向面板估计量收敛到方差加权平均处理效应。

papers.title: Recent Advances in Causal Analysis of the Stochastic Frontier Model
papers.abstract: Causal inference methods (instrumental variables, difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, etc.) are primary tools used across many social science milieus. One area where their application has lagged however, is in the study of productivity and efficiency. A main reason for this is that the nature of the stochastic frontier model does not immediately lend itself to a causal framework when interest hinges on an error component of the model. This paper reviews the nascent literature on attempts to merge the stochastic frontier literature with causal inference methods. We discuss modeling approaches and empirical issues that are likely to be relevant for applied researchers in this area. This review shows how this model can be easily put within the confines of causal analysis, reviews existing work that has already made inroads in this area, addresses challenges that have yet to be met and discusses core findings.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机前沿模型因果分析的最新进展
papers.chineseAbstract: 因果推断方法（如工具变量、双重差分、回归断点等）是许多社会科学领域的主要工具。然而，在生产力和效率的研究中，这些方法的应用相对滞后。主要原因是，当研究兴趣集中在模型的误差成分上时，随机前沿模型的性质并不立即适用于因果分析框架。本文回顾了将随机前沿文献与因果推断方法相结合的初步文献。我们讨论了可能对该领域应用研究者相关的建模方法和实证问题。这篇综述展示了如何将该模型轻松纳入因果分析的范畴，回顾了在该领域已经取得进展的现有工作，解决了尚未克服的挑战，并讨论了核心发现。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性较强，方法论规范但不够前沿，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 将随机前沿模型与因果推断方法结合，拓展了应用领域。

papers.title: Fair Commodity Taxation
papers.abstract: We study economies where consumers interact independently with many monopolists. When consumer valuations over goods are correlated, correlation can distort the induced distribution of consumer surplus (information rents). We identify which shifts in the correlation structure over values makes the induced distribution more or less fair, in the sense of second order stochastic dominance. We then investigate the role taxation can have on information rents, and show the tax authority never benefits from randomizing the allocation of goods. We characterize the set of mechanisms that are on the fairness-efficiency frontier under regularity conditions on the distribution of types. Furthermore, under these conditions all allocations on the fairness-efficiency frontier ration the good more than an unregulated monopolist. Finally, we discuss implications of our model for luxury commodity taxation.
papers.chineseTitle: 公平的商品税收
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了消费者独立与多个垄断者进行交互的经济体。当消费者对商品的估值存在相关性时，这种相关性可能会扭曲消费者剩余（信息租金）的诱导分布。我们确定了哪些估值相关性结构的变化会使诱导分布更加或更少公平，这里公平的定义是二阶随机占优。接着，我们探讨了税收对信息租金的作用，并表明税务机关从随机分配商品中无法获得任何好处。在类型分布的常规条件下，我们刻画了位于公平-效率前沿的机制集合。此外，在这些条件下，所有位于公平-效率前沿的分配方式都比不受管制的垄断者更理性地分配商品。最后，我们讨论了我们的模型对奢侈品税收的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 本文研究了公平商品税收机制及其对消费者剩余的影响。

papers.title: Pseudo-Substitutability: A Maximal Domain for Pairwise Stability in Matching Markets with Contracts
papers.abstract: We study the existence of pairwise stable allocations in matching markets with contracts and propose a domain restriction that guarantees their existence. Specifically, we define pseudo-substitutable preferences, a domain that strictly extends the classical notion of substitutability while still preserving the existence of pairwise stable allocations. This domain accommodates limited complementarities among contracts while retaining enough structure to preserve the key stability properties of substitutable preferences. Moreover, we show that, among all preference domains that contain the classical substitutable domain and guarantee the existence of pairwise stable allocations, the pseudo-substitutable domain is maximal. Our results establish that pairwise stability extends well beyond the classical substitutable domain.
papers.chineseTitle: 伪可替代性：合同匹配市场中两两稳定性的最大领域
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了合同匹配市场中两两稳定分配的存在性，并提出了一种领域限制，以确保其存在。具体而言，我们定义了伪可替代性偏好，这一领域严格扩展了经典的可替代性概念，同时仍保留了两两稳定分配的存在性。该领域允许合同之间存在有限的互补性，同时保留了足够的结构以维持可替代性偏好的关键稳定性属性。此外，我们证明，在所有包含经典可替代性领域并保证两两稳定分配存在的偏好领域中，伪可替代性领域是最大的。我们的研究结果确立了两两稳定性在经典可替代性领域之外的广泛适用性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 提出伪可替代性偏好，扩展了合同匹配市场的稳定性领域。

papers.title: On Rent Dissipation in Dynamic Multi-battle Contests
papers.abstract: We study dynamic multi-battle contests and examine how the contest structure shapes dynamic incentives and determines the extent of rent dissipation. A discouragement effect often arises -- such as in tug-of-war and best-of-$K$ contests -- preventing full rent dissipation even when the series can extend infinitely. We identify a structural property, exchangeability, that contributes to the effect. Leveraging this insight, we establish a necessary and sufficient condition for almost-full rent dissipation. As an application, we introduce the iterated incumbency contest, which illustrates how volatility in the surrounding environment sustains dynamic incentives and generates almost-full rent dissipation, and thus offers insights into various competitive phenomena.
papers.chineseTitle: 动态多阶段竞赛中的租金耗散研究
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了动态多阶段竞赛，并探讨了竞赛结构如何塑造动态激励并决定租金耗散的程度。在诸如拔河比赛和$K$局最佳赛等竞赛中，常常会出现一种抑制效应，即使系列赛可以无限延伸，也能防止租金完全耗散。我们确定了一个结构属性——可交换性，它对这种效应起到了贡献作用。利用这一洞见，我们建立了几乎完全租金耗散的充要条件。作为应用，我们引入了迭代在位竞赛，该竞赛展示了周围环境中的波动性如何维持动态激励并产生几乎完全的租金耗散，从而为各种竞争现象提供了洞见。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 揭示动态多阶段竞赛中租金耗散机制及抑制效应。

papers.title: Perceived Social Norms under Uncertainty
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a belief-based framework for social norms in environments where individuals choose a single action. Relaxing the assumption that what is appropriate is common knowledge, this framework allows individuals to be uncertain about it, and to hold heterogeneous assessments and beliefs about others' assessments. Within this framework, perceived injunctive social norm, personal values, and empirical expectations, while distinct, are systematically connected through an informational structure. The framework further clarifies how provided information shapes perceived norms: its effect depends on what is disclosed, whether it is publicly or privately revealed, and how the disclosed object encodes underlying information.
papers.chineseTitle: 不确定性下的感知社会规范
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一个基于信念的社会规范框架，适用于个体选择单一行动的环境。该框架放宽了“何为恰当行为是共同知识”的假设，允许个体对此存在不确定性，并对他人评估持有异质性评估和信念。在此框架内，感知到的指令性社会规范、个人价值观和经验预期虽然各不相同，但通过信息结构系统地相互连接。该框架进一步阐明了提供的信息如何塑造感知到的规范：其影响取决于所披露的内容、是公开还是私下披露，以及披露对象如何编码潜在信息。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论规范但不够前沿，实证较薄弱，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出新框架解释不确定性下社会规范感知机制。

papers.title: From Clerks to Agentic-AI: How will Technology Change Labor Market in Finance?
papers.abstract: Financial firms have gone through three major technological waves: computerization in the 1980s and 1990s, the rise of indexing and passive investing in the 2000s and 2010s, and the AI and automation wave from roughly 2015 to the present. This project studies how much labor is required to manage capital across those waves by tracking a simple productivity measure: assets under management per employee. Using a small panel of representative firms, we compare changes in AUM per employee, revenue per employee, and operating expense intensity over time. The goal is not to identify causal effects, but to document stylized facts about how technology changes the scale of asset management work.
papers.chineseTitle: 从职员到智能体AI：技术将如何改变金融劳动力市场？
papers.chineseAbstract: 金融公司经历了三次主要的技术浪潮：20世纪80年代和90年代的计算机化，21世纪头十年和2010年代的指数化和被动投资兴起，以及大约从2015年至今的人工智能和自动化浪潮。本项目通过追踪一个简单的生产率指标——每位员工管理的资产规模，来研究在这些技术浪潮中管理资本所需的劳动力数量。我们使用了一个由代表性公司组成的小型面板数据集，比较了每位员工管理的资产规模、每位员工的收入以及运营费用强度随时间的变化。研究的目标不是确定因果关系，而是记录技术如何改变资产管理工作的规模这一风格化事实。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文选题新颖，方法规范，实证较扎实，对金融劳动力市场研究有一定影响，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 研究技术变革对金融劳动力市场资产管理规模的影响。

papers.title: Convex Duality in Perturbed Utility Route Choice
papers.abstract: This paper develops a highly general convex duality framework for the perturbed utility route choice (PURC) model. We show that the traveler's constrained, potentially non-smooth utility maximization problem admits a dual formulation: an unconstrained concave maximization problem with a differentiable objective. The unique optimal flow can be recovered link-by-link from any dual solution via the convex conjugates of link perturbation functions. These properties enable efficient gradient-based optimization for large-scale networks and fast computation for sensitivity analysis. Finally, the framework reveals a structural analogy between PURC and current flow in electrical circuits.
papers.chineseTitle: 扰动效用路径选择中的凸对偶性
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文为扰动效用路径选择（PURC）模型开发了一个高度通用的凸对偶框架。我们证明了旅行者受约束的、可能非光滑的效用最大化问题存在一个对偶表述：一个无约束的凹最大化问题，其目标函数可微。通过链路扰动函数的凸共轭，可以从任何对偶解中逐链路恢复唯一的最优流。这些特性使得基于梯度的优化方法能够高效应用于大规模网络，并实现敏感性分析的快速计算。最后，该框架揭示了PURC与电路中电流流动之间的结构相似性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出PURC模型的凸对偶框架，揭示其与电路电流的相似性。

papers.title: Sharing the proceeds from a hierarchical venture when agents have needs
papers.abstract: We consider a setting in which a set of agents are hierarchically organized for a joint venture. They each generate revenues for the joint venture and have individual needs to cover. The aim is to distribute aggregate revenues appropriately. We characterize a family of need-adjusted geometric rules where the net revenue (after covering needs) "bubbles up" in the hierarchy, as well as a need-adjusted serial rule in which the net revenue is equally shared among each agent and his predecessors in the hierarchy.
papers.chineseTitle: 当代理人有需求时，层级合作企业中的收益分配
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文考虑了一种情境，即一组代理人以层级方式组织起来进行一项联合投资。他们各自为联合投资创造收益，同时也有各自的需求需要满足。目标是适当地分配总收益。本文刻画了一类需求调整的几何规则，其中净收益（在满足需求之后）在层级中“向上流动”，以及一种需求调整的序列规则，其中净收益在每个代理人及其在层级中的前辈之间平均分配。这些规则旨在确保收益分配既考虑了代理人的个人需求，又遵循了层级结构中的某种公平原则。通过引入需求调整因子，这些规则能够更灵活地适应不同代理人的需求差异，从而在层级合作企业中实现更为合理和公平的收益分配。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性一般，方法论规范，实证薄弱，有一定影响，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出需求调整的几何与序列规则，实现层级企业收益公平分配。

papers.title: Causal Persuasion
papers.abstract: We propose a model of causal persuasion, in which a sender selectively discloses a set of variables together with their true joint distribution and proposes a subjective causal model that binds them. A receiver is persuaded by this model only if the data conclusively identifies the causal link of interest. We characterize when such persuasion succeeds or fails, and how easily it can be achieved. We further show that if the receiver holds a pre-existing subjective model, debunking it is similar to persuading a receiver without one. To establish a true causal link, the sender often needs to disclose only one or two well-chosen variables. But to dispel a perceived link -- to persuade the receiver there is no causal relationship -- every common cause must be disclosed. Our results highlight a fundamental asymmetry in causal persuasion: Establishing causality is often much easier than ruling it out.

papers.title: Optimal linear-payment auction design with aftermarket collaboration
papers.abstract: This paper studies optimal auction design when valuations depend endogenously on post-auction collaboration between the seller and the winning bidder. Both parties exert non-contractible efforts after the auction, generating a double moral hazard problem alongside adverse selection. We analyze two role structures -- winner-pivotal and seller-pivotal collaboration -- and characterize optimal direct mechanisms using linear payment schemes that combine cash transfers with proportional value sharing. The optimal mechanism allocates the asset to the bidder with the highest virtual surplus, employs a deterministic value-sharing rule, and achieves full type revelation through the signal realization rule. Comparing the two scenarios yields three main findings. First, regarding value sharing, the seller secures a strictly higher share under seller-pivotal collaboration: for sufficiently low-type winners, the seller extracts the entire value, whereas under winner-pivotal collaboration every winner must retain a positive share to sustain his critical effort. Second, regarding effort exertion, the pivotal party always exerts higher post-auction effort than the supporting party, and each party exerts greater effort when pivotal than when providing support. Third, seller-pivotal collaboration yields strictly higher seller revenue than winner-pivotal collaboration for any type distribution. Finally, these optimal mechanisms can be implemented through ascending auctions with endogenously determined linear contracts.
papers.chineseTitle: 考虑拍卖后合作的线性支付最优拍卖设计
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了当估值内生地依赖于拍卖后卖方与中标者之间的合作时，最优拍卖设计的问题。拍卖后双方均付出不可合约化的努力，从而产生双重道德风险问题以及逆向选择问题。本文分析了两种角色结构——中标者关键合作与卖方关键合作，并使用结合现金转移与比例价值共享的线性支付方案，刻画了最优直接机制。最优机制将资产分配给具有最高虚拟剩余的投标者，采用确定性的价值共享规则，并通过信号实现规则实现完全类型揭示。比较两种情景得出三个主要发现。首先，在价值共享方面，卖方在卖方关键合作下获得严格更高的份额：对于类型足够低的中标者，卖方提取全部价值；而在中标者关键合作下，每个中标者必须保留正份额以维持其关键努力。其次，在努力付出方面，关键方总是比支持方付出更高的拍卖后努力，且当作为关键方时比作为支持方时付出更多努力。第三，对于任何类型分布，卖方关键合作产生的卖方收入严格高于中标者关键合作。最后，这些最优机制可以通过具有内生确定线性合同的升价拍卖来实现。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证稍弱，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出考虑拍卖后合作的线性支付最优拍卖设计机制。

papers.title: How damaging is zero-sum thinking to an agent's interests when the world is positive-sum?
papers.abstract: We study whether zero-sum decision rules, maximin and minimax, harm agents' interests in positive-sum strategic environments relative to Nash equilibrium behavior or, more generally, than best response behaviour. Contrary to an influential evolutionary view, we give illustrations where maximin serves an agent's interests better than Nash equilibrium behaviour. We also show that these illustration are not atypical or idiosyncratic because, in our main result, the class of such games where a maximin profile strictly Pareto dominates all Nash equilibria has the same cardinality as the class of games in which a Nash equilibrium strictly Pareto dominates all maximin profiles. Thus, neither behavior is generally superior. We further identify additional mechanisms favoring maximin over Nash equilibrium, including coordination failures under multiple equilibria, where maximin can outperform Nash play in realised-pay-off terms. A systematic analysis of strictly ordinal symmetric 3x3 games shows that these effects arise with non-trivial frequency. Our findings, therefore, suggest that the observed rise in zero-sum thinking in many rich countries, when associated with a maximin decision rule, will not be readily displaced through its generation of inferior pay-offs.
papers.chineseTitle: 当世界为正和博弈时，零和思维对参与者利益的损害有多大？
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在正和博弈的战略环境中，零和决策规则（最大最小和最小最大）相对于纳什均衡行为或更一般的最佳反应行为，是否会损害参与者的利益。与一种有影响力的进化观点相反，本文给出了最大最小规则比纳什均衡行为更有利于参与者利益的例子。本文还表明，这些例子并非不典型或特殊，因为在主要结果中，最大最小策略严格帕累托优于所有纳什均衡的游戏类别，与纳什均衡严格帕累托优于所有最大最小策略的游戏类别具有相同的基数。因此，没有一种行为普遍优越。本文还进一步确定了有利于最大最小而非纳什均衡的其他机制，包括在多重均衡下的协调失败，其中最大最小在实现收益方面可以优于纳什均衡。对严格序对称3x3博弈的系统分析表明，这些效应以非微不足道的频率出现。因此，本文的研究结果表明，在许多富裕国家观察到的零和思维上升，当与最大最小决策规则相关联时，不会因其产生较低收益而轻易被取代。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新颖观点，挑战了传统看法，方法论规范，实证分析较扎实，对理论经济学有较大影响，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 挑战传统观点，揭示零和思维在正和博弈中的潜在优势。

papers.title: Clustered Local Projections for Time-Varying Models
papers.abstract: We propose a clustered local projection (clustered LP) method to estimate impulse response functions in a class of time-varying models where parameter variation is linked to a low-dimensional matrix of observables. We show that the clustered LP recovers the conditional average response when the driving variables are exogenous and a weighted average of the conditional marginal effects when they are endogenous. We propose an iterative estimation method that first classifies the data using k-means, estimates impulse response functions via GMM, and evaluates differences across clustered LP estimates. Our Monte Carlo simulations illustrate the ability of clustered LP to approximate the conditional average response function. We employ our technique to examine how uncertainty influences the transmission of a contractionary monetary policy shock to the 5- and 10-year U.S. nominal Treasury yields. Our estimation results suggest macroeconomic and monetary policy uncertainty operate through complementary but distinct channels: the former primarily amplifies the risk compensation embedded in the term premium, while the latter governs the speed and persistence with which markets revise their expectations about the future rate path following a monetary policy shock.
papers.chineseTitle: 时变模型中的聚类局部投影法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种聚类局部投影（clustered LP）方法，用于估计一类时变模型中的脉冲响应函数，其中参数变化与低维可观测矩阵相关联。我们证明了当驱动变量为外生时，聚类局部投影法能够恢复条件平均响应；当驱动变量为内生时，该方法能够恢复条件边际效应的加权平均。我们提出了一种迭代估计方法，该方法首先使用k均值对数据进行分类，然后通过广义矩估计（GMM）估计脉冲响应函数，并评估聚类局部投影估计之间的差异。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，聚类局部投影法能够很好地近似条件平均响应函数。我们运用该方法研究了不确定性如何影响紧缩性货币政策冲击对美国5年期和10年期名义国债收益率的传导。估计结果表明，宏观经济和货币政策不确定性通过互补但不同的渠道发挥作用：前者主要放大了期限溢价中嵌入的风险补偿，而后者则控制了货币政策冲击后市场修正其未来利率路径预期的速度和持续性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法创新性强，实证较扎实，但实证部分略显薄弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出聚类局部投影法，研究时变模型中不确定性对货币政策传导的影响。

papers.title: Subsample-based Estimation under Dynamic Contamination
papers.abstract: Subsample-based estimation is a standard tool for achieving robustness to outliers in econometric models. This paper shows that, in dynamic time series settings, such procedures are fundamentally invalid under contamination, even under oracle knowledge of contamination locations. The key issue is that contamination propagates through the model's residual filter and distorts the estimation criterion itself. As a result, removing contaminated observations does not, in general, restore the uncontaminated objective or ensure consistency. We characterise this failure as a structural incompatibility between pointwise subsampling and residual propagation. To address it, we propose a propagation-compatible transformation of index sets, formalised through a patch removal operator that removes the residual footprint of contamination. Under suitable conditions, the proposed operator leaves the estimator asymptotically unchanged under the uncontaminated model, while restoring consistency for the clean-data parameter under contamination. The results apply to a broad class of residual-based estimators and show that valid subsample-based estimation in dynamic models requires explicit control of residual propagation.
papers.chineseTitle: 动态污染下的子样本估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 子样本估计作为计量经济学模型中实现稳健性的标准工具，在动态时间序列设定下，即便在已知污染位置的理想情况下，此类方法在污染环境下也从根本上失效。关键问题在于污染通过模型的残差滤波传播，并扭曲了估计准则本身。因此，移除受污染观测值通常无法恢复无污染目标或确保一致性。本文将这种失败描述为点式子采样与残差传播之间的结构性不兼容。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种索引集的传播兼容变换，通过补丁移除算子正式化，该算子可移除污染的残差足迹。在适当条件下，所提算子在无污染模型下保持估计量渐近不变，同时在污染情况下恢复清洁数据参数的一致性。结果适用于广泛的基于残差的估计量，并表明动态模型中的有效子样本估计需要显式控制残差传播。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出新方法解决动态污染问题，创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出传播兼容变换解决动态污染下子样本估计失效问题。

papers.title: A Model and Estimation of the Bitcoin Transaction Fee
papers.abstract: Bitcoin transaction fees will become more important as the block subsidy declines, but fee formation is hard to study with blockchain data alone because the relevant queueing environment is unobserved. We develop and estimate a structural model of Bitcoin fee choice that treats the mempool as a market for scarce blockspace. We assemble a novel, high-frequency mempool panel, from a self-run Bitcoin node that records transaction arrivals, exits, block inclusion, fee-bumping events, and congestion snapshots. We characterize the fee market as a Vickery-Clarke-Groves mechanism and derive an equation to estimate fees. In the first-stage we estimate a monotone delay technology linking fee-rate priority and network state to expected confirmation delay. We then estimate how fees respond to that delay technology and to transaction characteristics. We find that congestion is the main determinant of delay; that the marginal value of priority is priced in fees, which is increasing in the gradient of confirmation time reduction per movement up in the fee queue; and that transactor choice of RBF, CPFP, and block conditions have economically important effects on fees.
papers.chineseTitle: 比特币交易费用的模型与估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 随着区块补贴的减少，比特币交易费用将变得愈发重要。然而，仅凭区块链数据难以研究费用形成机制，因为相关的排队环境无法被观测。本文开发并估计了一个比特币费用选择的结构模型，将内存池视为稀缺区块空间的市场。我们通过自运行的比特币节点，收集了一个新颖的高频内存池面板数据集，记录了交易到达、退出、区块包含、费用提升事件以及拥堵快照。我们将费用市场刻画为Vickery-Clarke-Groves机制，并推导出估计费用的方程。在第一阶段，我们估计了一种单调延迟技术，将费率优先级和网络状态与预期确认延迟联系起来。然后，我们估计了费用如何响应这种延迟技术以及交易特征。我们发现，拥堵是延迟的主要决定因素；优先级的边际价值在费用中得到了体现，且随着费用队列中每向上移动一个位置所减少的确认时间的梯度增加而增加；交易者选择RBF、CPFP和区块条件对费用具有经济上重要的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性较强，方法严谨，实证充分，但影响力可能受限于特定领域，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 构建比特币费用选择模型，揭示费用形成机制。

papers.title: Bootstrap consistency for general double/debiased machine learning estimators
papers.abstract: Double/debiased machine learning (DML) provides a general framework for inference with high-dimensional or otherwise complex nuisance parameters by combining Neyman-orthogonal scores with cross-fitting, thereby circumventing classical Donsker-type conditions in many modern machine-learning settings. Despite its strong empirical performance, bootstrap inference for DML estimators has received little theoretical justification. This is particularly noteworthy since bootstrap methods are suggested ad used for inference on DML estimators, even though bootstrap procedures can fail for estimators that are root-$n$ consistent and asymptotically normal. This paper fills this gap by establishing bootstrap validity for DML estimators under general exchangeably weighted resampling schemes, with Efron's bootstrap as a special case. Under exactly the same conditions required for the validity of DML itself, we prove that the bootstrap law converges conditionally weakly to the sampling law of the original estimator.
papers.chineseTitle: 一般双重/去偏机器学习估计量的自助法一致性
papers.chineseAbstract: 双重/去偏机器学习（DML）通过结合Neyman正交分数与交叉拟合，为高维或复杂干扰参数的推断提供了一个通用框架，从而在许多现代机器学习环境中规避了经典的Donsker型条件。尽管DML在实际应用中表现出色，但针对DML估计量的自助法推断却鲜有理论支持。这一点尤为值得关注，因为尽管自助法程序可能对于根n一致且渐近正态的估计量失效，但它们仍被建议并用于对DML估计量的推断。本文通过在一般可交换加权重采样方案下（以Efron的自助法为特例）建立DML估计量的自助法有效性，填补了这一空白。在DML本身有效性所需的完全相同条件下，我们证明了自助法分布条件性地弱收敛于原始估计量的抽样分布。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍弱，整体影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 证明了DML估计量在一般重采样方案下的自助法有效性。

papers.title: Causal inference for social network formation
papers.abstract: This paper develops a framework for identification, estimation, and inference on the causal mechanisms driving endogenous social network formation. Identification is challenging because of unobserved confounders and reverse causality; inference is complicated by questions of equilibrium and sampling. We leverage repeated observations of a network over time and random variation in initial ties to address challenges to causal identification. Our design-based approach sidesteps questions of sampling and asymptotics by treating both the set of nodes (individuals) and potential outcomes as non-random. We apply our approach to data from a large professional services firm, where new hires are randomly assigned to project teams within offices. We estimate the causal effect on tie formation of indirect ties, network degree, and local network density. Indirect ties have a strong and significant positive effect on tie formation, while the effects of degree and density are smaller and less robust.
papers.chineseTitle: 社交网络形成的因果推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文开发了一个框架，用于识别、估计和推断驱动内生社交网络形成的因果机制。由于存在未观察到的混杂因素和反向因果关系，识别过程颇具挑战性；而由于涉及均衡和抽样问题，推断过程也变得复杂。本文利用网络随时间重复观测的数据以及初始联系的随机变化，来应对因果识别方面的挑战。我们的基于设计的方法通过将节点（个体）集合和潜在结果均视为非随机变量，从而避开了抽样和渐近性的问题。我们将此方法应用于一家大型专业服务公司的数据，其中新员工被随机分配到办公室内的项目团队。我们估计了间接联系、网络度数和局部网络密度对联系形成的影响。结果显示，间接联系对联系形成具有显著且强烈的正向影响，而度数和密度的影响则较小且不够稳健。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在社交网络因果推断方面有显著创新，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般，影响尚待观察。
papers.summary: 开发新框架，量化社交网络形成中的因果效应。

papers.title: Factor-Augmented Panel Regressions and Variance-Weighted Treatment Effects
papers.abstract: We revisit panel regressions with unobserved heterogeneity through the lens of variance-weighted average treatment effects. Building on established results for cross-sectional OLS and one-way fixed effects panels, we show that two-way panel estimators with latent factors, specifically the principal components estimator of Greenaway-McGrevy, Han and Sul (2012) and the interactive fixed effects estimator of Bai (2009), also converge to interpretable estimands under fully nonparametric assumptions. Both estimators consistently estimate the same variance-weighted average of unit-time-specific treatment effects, where the weights are proportional to the conditional variance of the regressor given the unobserved heterogeneity. The result requires the number of estimated factors to grow with the sample size and applies to the single regressor case. We discuss the challenges that arise when extending to multiple regressors and to inference.
papers.chineseTitle: 因子增强面板回归与方差加权处理效应
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文通过方差加权平均处理效应的视角重新审视了具有未观测异质性的面板回归。基于横截面OLS和单向固定效应面板的既定结果，我们证明了具有潜在因子的双向面板估计量，特别是Greenaway-McGrevy、Han和Sul（2012）的主成分估计量以及Bai（2009）的交互固定效应估计量，在完全非参数假设下也收敛于可解释的估计量。两种估计量都一致地估计了单位时间特定处理效应的相同方差加权平均值，其中权重与给定未观测异质性的回归变量的条件方差成比例。这一结果要求估计的因子数量随样本量增加，并适用于单一回归变量的情况。我们讨论了扩展到多个回归变量和进行推断时面临的挑战。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论上有一定创新，实证部分稍显薄弱，整体可读性较好，对领域有较大影响。
papers.summary: 双向面板估计量收敛于方差加权平均处理效应。

papers.title: Fair Commodity Taxation
papers.abstract: We study economies where consumers interact independently with many monopolists. When consumer valuations over goods are correlated, correlation can distort the induced distribution of consumer surplus (information rents). We identify which shifts in the correlation structure over values makes the induced distribution more or less fair, in the sense of second order stochastic dominance. We then investigate the role taxation can have on information rents, and show the tax authority never benefits from randomizing the allocation of goods. We characterize the set of mechanisms that are on the fairness-efficiency frontier under regularity conditions on the distribution of types. Furthermore, under these conditions all allocations on the fairness-efficiency frontier ration the good more than an unregulated monopolist. Finally, we discuss implications of our model for luxury commodity taxation.
papers.chineseTitle: 公平的商品税收
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了消费者独立与多个垄断者进行互动的经济体。当消费者对商品的估值存在相关性时，这种相关性可能会扭曲消费者剩余（信息租金）的诱导分布。我们确定了在何种估值相关性结构变化下，诱导分布会变得更公平或更不公平，这里的公平性是指二阶随机占优。接着，我们探讨了税收对信息租金的作用，并表明税务机关从随机分配商品中无法获益。在类型分布的常规条件下，我们刻画了位于公平-效率前沿的机制集合。此外，在这些条件下，所有位于公平-效率前沿的分配都比不受监管的垄断者更理性地分配商品。最后，我们讨论了我们的模型对奢侈品税收的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性较强，方法严谨，实证稍弱，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 研究公平商品税收中消费者估值相关性的影响。

papers.title: Pseudo-Substitutability: A Maximal Domain for Pairwise Stability in Matching Markets with Contracts
papers.abstract: We study the existence of pairwise stable allocations in matching markets with contracts and propose a domain restriction that guarantees their existence. Specifically, we define pseudo-substitutable preferences, a domain that strictly extends the classical notion of substitutability while still preserving the existence of pairwise stable allocations. This domain accommodates limited complementarities among contracts while retaining enough structure to preserve the key stability properties of substitutable preferences. Moreover, we show that, among all preference domains that contain the classical substitutable domain and guarantee the existence of pairwise stable allocations, the pseudo-substitutable domain is maximal. Our results establish that pairwise stability extends well beyond the classical substitutable domain.
papers.chineseTitle: 伪可替代性：带合同匹配市场中两两稳定性的最大领域
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了带合同匹配市场中两两稳定分配的存在性，并提出了一种领域限制，以确保其存在。具体而言，我们定义了伪可替代偏好，这一领域严格扩展了经典的可替代性概念，同时仍保留了两两稳定分配的存在性。该领域允许合同之间存在有限的互补性，同时保留了足够的结构以维持可替代偏好的关键稳定性属性。此外，我们证明，在所有包含经典可替代领域并保证两两稳定分配存在的偏好领域中，伪可替代领域是最大的。我们的研究结果确立了两两稳定性在经典可替代领域之外的广泛适用性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证稍弱，影响较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出伪可替代偏好，扩展了两两稳定分配的存在性领域。

papers.title: Perceived Social Norms under Uncertainty
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a belief-based framework for social norms in environments where individuals choose a single action. Relaxing the assumption that what is appropriate is common knowledge, this framework allows individuals to be uncertain about it, and to hold heterogeneous assessments and beliefs about others' assessments. Within this framework, perceived injunctive social norm, personal values, and empirical expectations, while distinct, are systematically connected through an informational structure. The framework further clarifies how provided information shapes perceived norms: its effect depends on what is disclosed, whether it is publicly or privately revealed, and how the disclosed object encodes underlying information.
papers.chineseTitle: 不确定性下的感知社会规范
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一个基于信念的社会规范框架，适用于个体选择单一行动的环境。该框架放宽了“何为恰当行为是共同知识”的假设，允许个体对此存在不确定性，并对他人评估持有异质性评估和信念。在此框架内，感知到的指令性社会规范、个人价值观和经验期望虽各不相同，但通过信息结构系统地相互关联。该框架进一步阐明了提供的信息如何塑造感知规范：其影响取决于所披露的内容、披露是公开还是私下进行，以及披露对象如何编码潜在信息。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出新框架解释不确定性下社会规范的感知与形成。

papers.title: Strategic Pricing and Consumer Welfare under One-Sided Price Regulation
papers.abstract: Motivated by Germany's April 2026 fuel price regulation, in this note I study a two-period pricing problem with demand uncertainty and a rule that prohibits more than one price increase during the day. Under flexible pricing, the firm chooses the static monopoly price in each period. Under the regulation, by contrast, it may price strategically high in period 1 to preserve flexibility in period 2. I show that the regulation weakly raises expected average prices. The increase is strict when future high demand is sufficiently likely and the gap between high and low demand is large; otherwise, expected average prices are unchanged. Consumer surplus rises when expected prices do not, and decreases otherwise.
papers.chineseTitle: 单边价格管制下的战略定价与消费者福利
papers.chineseAbstract: 受德国2026年4月燃料价格管制政策的启发，本文研究了在需求不确定性和一天内禁止价格上调超过一次的规则下的两期定价问题。在灵活定价的情况下，企业在每个时期选择静态垄断价格。相比之下，在管制下，企业可能会在第一期制定较高的战略价格，以保留第二期的灵活性。本文表明，该管制政策会弱化地提高预期平均价格。当未来高需求的可能性足够大，且高低需求之间的差距较大时，预期平均价格会严格上升；否则，预期平均价格保持不变。当预期价格不变时，消费者剩余增加；否则，消费者剩余减少。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性较强，方法严谨，但实证部分薄弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 单边价格管制可能提高预期价格，影响消费者福利。

papers.title: Sharing the proceeds from a hierarchical venture when agents have needs
papers.abstract: We consider a setting in which a set of agents are hierarchically organized for a joint venture. They each generate revenues for the joint venture and have individual needs to cover. The aim is to distribute aggregate revenues appropriately. We characterize a family of need-adjusted geometric rules where the net revenue (after covering needs) "bubbles up" in the hierarchy, as well as a need-adjusted serial rule in which the net revenue is equally shared among each agent and his predecessors in the hierarchy.
papers.chineseTitle: 当代理人有需求时，层级合作企业中的收益分配
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文考虑了一种情境，即一组代理人为一项联合项目进行层级组织。他们各自为联合项目创造收入，并有个体需求需要满足。目标是适当地分配总收入。本文刻画了一类需求调整的几何规则，其中净收入（在满足需求之后）在层级结构中“向上流动”，以及一种需求调整的序列规则，其中净收入在每个代理人及其在层级结构中的前驱之间平等分享。通过这些规则，本文探讨了如何在满足个体需求的同时，实现层级合作企业中的公平收益分配。研究不仅为理解层级组织中的收益分配提供了新的视角，还为实际政策制定提供了有价值的参考。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的收益分配规则，创新性显著，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出了层级合作企业中需求调整的收益分配新规则。

papers.title: A Model and Estimation of the Bitcoin Transaction Fee
papers.abstract: Bitcoin transaction fees will become more important as the block subsidy declines, but fee formation is hard to study with blockchain data alone because the relevant queueing environment is unobserved. We develop and estimate a structural model of Bitcoin fee choice that treats the mempool as a market for scarce blockspace. We assemble a novel, high-frequency mempool panel, from a self-run Bitcoin node that records transaction arrivals, exits, block inclusion, fee-bumping events, and congestion snapshots. We characterize the fee market as a Vickery-Clarke-Groves mechanism and derive an equation to estimate fees. In the first-stage we estimate a monotone delay technology linking fee-rate priority and network state to expected confirmation delay. We then estimate how fees respond to that delay technology and to transaction characteristics. We find that congestion is the main determinant of delay; that the marginal value of priority is priced in fees, which is increasing in the gradient of confirmation time reduction per movement up in the fee queue; and that transactor choice of RBF, CPFP, and block conditions have economically important effects on fees.
papers.chineseTitle: 比特币交易费用的模型与估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 随着区块补贴的减少，比特币交易费用将变得愈发重要。然而，仅凭区块链数据难以研究费用形成机制，因为相关的排队环境无法被直接观测。本文开发并估计了一个比特币费用选择的结构模型，将内存池视为稀缺区块空间的市场。我们通过自运行的比特币节点，组装了一个新颖的高频内存池面板数据集，记录了交易到达、退出、区块包含、费用提升事件以及拥堵快照。我们将费用市场描述为Vickery-Clarke-Groves机制，并推导出估计费用的方程。在第一阶段，我们估计了一个单调延迟技术，将费率优先级和网络状态与预期确认延迟联系起来。然后，我们估计了费用如何响应这种延迟技术以及交易特征。我们发现，拥堵是延迟的主要决定因素；优先级的边际价值体现在费用中，且随着费用队列中每向上移动一个位置所减少的确认时间的梯度而增加；交易者选择的RBF、CPFP和区块条件对费用具有经济上重要的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，影响较大，但可读性稍弱。
papers.summary: 构建比特币费用选择模型，揭示费用形成机制。

papers.title: Bootstrap consistency for general double/debiased machine learning estimators
papers.abstract: Double/debiased machine learning (DML) provides a general framework for inference with high-dimensional or otherwise complex nuisance parameters by combining Neyman-orthogonal scores with cross-fitting, thereby circumventing classical Donsker-type conditions in many modern machine-learning settings. Despite its strong empirical performance, bootstrap inference for DML estimators has received little theoretical justification. This is particularly noteworthy since bootstrap methods are suggested ad used for inference on DML estimators, even though bootstrap procedures can fail for estimators that are root-$n$ consistent and asymptotically normal. This paper fills this gap by establishing bootstrap validity for DML estimators under general exchangeably weighted resampling schemes, with Efron's bootstrap as a special case. Under exactly the same conditions required for the validity of DML itself, we prove that the bootstrap law converges conditionally weakly to the sampling law of the original estimator.

papers.title: Decomposition Envy-Freeness in Random Assignment
papers.abstract: In random assignment, fairness is often captured by stochastic-dominance envy-freeness (SD-EF). We observe that assignments satisfying SD-EF may admit decompositions that result in each agent envying another agent with high probability. To address this, we introduce decomposition envy-freeness (Dec-EF), which is a property of a decomposition rather than of an assignment matrix. We show that an SD-EF assignment matrix always admits a Dec-EF decomposition when there are at most three agents or the agents have at most two distinct preferences.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机分配中的分解无嫉妒性
papers.chineseAbstract: 在随机分配中，公平性通常通过随机占优无嫉妒性（SD-EF）来体现。我们观察到，满足SD-EF的分配可能会产生分解，导致每个代理人以高概率嫉妒另一个代理人。为了解决这一问题，我们引入了分解无嫉妒性（Dec-EF），这是一种分解的属性，而非分配矩阵的属性。我们证明了当最多有三个代理人或代理人最多有两种不同的偏好时，SD-EF分配矩阵总是存在Dec-EF分解。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法规范但不够前沿，实证较薄弱，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出分解无嫉妒性，解决随机分配中的公平性问题。

papers.title: Knowing that you do not know everything
papers.abstract: We show that a rational agent with true and refinable knowledge of events cannot know if she knows everything or not. This epistemic limitation is not resolved by introspection about tautologies or by learning about new events.
papers.chineseTitle: 知晓自己并非无所不知
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文表明，一个对事件拥有真实且可精炼知识的理性主体无法确定自己是否知晓一切。这种认知上的局限性无法通过内省关于重言式的知识或通过学习新事件来解决。研究揭示了理性主体在知识获取和认知边界上的根本性限制，挑战了传统经济学中关于完全理性的假设。作者通过逻辑推理和理论分析，论证了即使理性主体能够不断精炼和扩展其知识，也无法完全消除对自身知识边界的不确定性。这一发现对理解人类认知的局限性以及理性决策的边界具有重要意义，为经济学中的认知理论和决策理论提供了新的视角。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性较强，方法论严谨，但实证部分较弱，影响力尚待观察，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 揭示理性主体无法确定自身知识边界的认知局限。

papers.title: Sandpile Economics: Theory, Identification, and Evidence
papers.abstract: Why do capitalist economies recurrently generate crises whose severity is disproportionate to the size of the triggering shock? This paper proposes a structural answer grounded in the evolutionary geometry of production networks. As economies evolve through specialization, integration, and competitive selection, their inter-sectoral linkages drift toward configurations of increasing geometric fragility, eventually crossing a threshold beyond which small disturbances generate disproportionately large cascades.   We introduce Sandpile Economics, a formal framework that interprets macroeconomic instability as an emergent property of disequilibrium production networks. The key state variable is the Forman--Ricci curvature of the input--output graph, capturing local substitution possibilities when supply chains are disrupted. We show that when curvature falls below an endogenous threshold, the distribution of cascade sizes follows a power law with tail index $α\in (1,2)$, implying a regime of unbounded amplification.   The underlying mechanism is evolutionary: specialization reduces input substitutability, pushing the economy toward criticality, while crisis episodes induce endogenous network reconfiguration and path dependence. These dynamics are inherently non-ergodic and cannot be captured by representative-agent frameworks.   Empirically, using global input--output data, we document that production networks operate in persistently negative curvature regimes and that curvature robustly predicts medium-run output dynamics. A one-standard-deviation increase in curvature is associated with higher cumulative growth over three-year horizons, and curvature systematically outperforms standard network metrics in explaining cross-country differences in resilience.
papers.chineseTitle: 沙堆经济学：理论、识别与证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 为何资本主义经济会反复产生危机，且危机的严重程度与触发冲击的大小不成比例？本文基于生产网络的演化几何结构提出了一个结构性答案。随着经济通过专业化、整合和竞争选择而发展，其部门间联系逐渐趋向于几何脆弱性增加的配置，最终跨越一个阈值，使得小扰动引发不成比例的大规模连锁反应。我们引入了沙堆经济学这一正式框架，将宏观经济的不稳定性解释为非均衡生产网络的涌现属性。关键状态变量是投入产出图的Forman-Ricci曲率，它捕捉了供应链中断时的局部替代可能性。我们表明，当曲率低于一个内生阈值时，连锁反应大小的分布遵循幂律，尾指数α∈(1,2)，意味着存在无界放大的机制。其背后的机制是演化的：专业化降低了投入的可替代性，推动经济走向临界状态，而危机事件则引发内生网络重构和路径依赖。这些动态本质上是非遍历的，无法通过代表性主体框架来捕捉。实证上，利用全球投入产出数据，我们记录了生产网络在持续负曲率状态下运行，且曲率稳健地预测了中期产出动态。曲率每增加一个标准差，与三年期累计增长更高相关，且曲率在解释国家间韧性差异方面系统性地优于标准网络指标。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般，部分内容较难理解。
papers.summary: 提出沙堆经济学框架，解释宏观经济不稳定性。

papers.title: The Revenue Effect of Demand Misspecification in Event Ticket Pricing
papers.abstract: We study a finite-horizon dynamic pricing problem for event tickets with limited inventory and time-varying demand. The central practical difficulty is that the total demand function $L(t)$ is not observed directly and must be estimated from data, while pricing decisions are sensitive to its temporal shape. The paper examines how the accuracy of this estimate affects revenue.   We consider a model in which sales intensity is driven by the total demand $L(t)$, a price-response function $v(p)$, and a time-dependent willingness-to-pay factor $\varphi(t)$. The factor $\varphi(t)$ plays a central role: it captures the increase in customers' willingness to pay as the event date approaches and makes the temporal profile of demand economically important for pricing. Within this framework, the updated numerical study evaluates a benchmark dynamic-programming policy across nine deterministic true-demand scenarios, a collection of feature-aware misspecifications of $L(t)$, and multiple environment regimes induced by $v(p)=e^{-ηp}$, the deadline factor $\varphi(t)$, and inventory level $Q$. The reported summaries are based on stochastic simulation and a ratio-of-means relative-loss metric. The results show that a more accurate representation of the temporal demand profile leads to more effective pricing decisions and higher revenue. Over the full misspecification collection the aggregate relative revenue loss is $0.42\%$, the upper decile exceeds $1\%$, and the most expensive errors are omissions of late-demand components. The average effect is therefore modest but non-negligible, and it becomes stronger when deadline effects are pronounced and inventory is tight.
papers.chineseTitle: 活动门票定价中需求误设对收入的影响
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在有限库存和时间变化需求下，活动门票的有限期动态定价问题。核心实践难点在于总需求函数L(t)无法直接观测，必须通过数据估计，而定价决策对其时间形状非常敏感。本文探讨了这种估计的准确性如何影响收入。我们考虑了一个模型，其中销售强度由总需求L(t)、价格响应函数v(p)和时间相关的支付意愿因子φ(t)驱动。因子φ(t)起着关键作用：它捕捉了随着活动日期临近，顾客支付意愿的增加，使得需求的时间分布对定价具有经济重要性。在此框架内，更新的数值研究评估了基准动态规划策略在九种确定性真实需求情景、一系列特征感知的L(t)误设以及由v(p)=e^(-ηp)、截止日期因子φ(t)和库存水平Q引发的多种环境制度下的表现。报告的总结基于随机模拟和均值比相对损失度量。结果表明，更准确地表示时间需求分布会导致更有效的定价决策和更高的收入。在整个误设集合中，总相对收入损失为0.42%，上十分位数超过1%，最昂贵的错误是遗漏了后期需求成分。因此，平均效应虽然适中但不可忽视，并且在截止日期效应显著和库存紧张时变得更强。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在动态定价领域有一定新意，方法严谨，实证充分，但创新性及影响力稍显不足。
papers.summary: 准确表示时间需求分布可提升定价决策和收入。

papers.title: Gender, Unpaid Work, and Social Norms in Young Italian Families: Evidence from Couples Time Diaries
papers.abstract: Why do large gender inequalities in everyday life persist even as women strengthen their attachment to paid work? Existing evidence shows that women continue to do more unpaid work than men, but much of that evidence is based on individual diaries, says little about how inequality is jointly organized within couples, and rarely links daily time allocation to directly measured gender attitudes. This paper addresses that gap using the TIMES Observatory, an original survey of 1,928 co-resident couples with at least one child younger than 11 in Emilia-Romagna or Campania. The data combine matched partner diaries for one weekday and one weekend day with rich socio-economic information and direct measures of gender norms. We document three main findings. First, women do substantially more unpaid work and spend more time with children, while men do more paid work and enjoy more leisure without children. Second, these asymmetries remain sizeable even among dual full-time couples, implying that stronger female labor-market attachment does not by itself equalize daily life. Third, more traditional gender attitudes - especially among men - are descriptively associated with lower male participation in childcare and domestic work and with wider gaps in discretionary leisure. The analysis is descriptive rather than causal, but it shows that gender inequality within couples is visible not only in the amount of work performed, but also in the distribution of time that is genuinely discretionary.
papers.chineseTitle: 意大利年轻家庭中的性别、无偿劳动与社会规范：来自夫妻时间日记的证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 为何在日常生活中，尽管女性加强了对有偿工作的依附，但性别不平等现象依然严重？现有证据表明，女性继续承担比男性更多的无偿劳动，但这些证据大多基于个人日记，很少涉及夫妻间不平等的共同组织方式，也很少将每日时间分配与直接测量的性别态度联系起来。本文利用TIMES观测站的数据填补了这一空白，该观测站对艾米利亚-罗马涅或坎帕尼亚地区1928对至少有一个11岁以下孩子的同居夫妻进行了原创性调查。数据结合了夫妻双方在一个工作日和一个周末日的时间日记，以及丰富的社会经济信息和直接测量的性别规范。我们记录了三个主要发现。首先，女性承担了更多的无偿劳动，并花更多时间陪伴孩子，而男性则从事更多的有偿工作，并在没有孩子陪伴时享受更多休闲时间。其次，即使在双职工全职夫妻中，这些不对称性仍然显著，这意味着女性劳动力市场依附的增强本身并不能使日常生活平等化。第三，更传统的性别态度——尤其是男性中的——与男性在育儿和家务劳动中的参与度较低，以及在自由支配休闲时间方面的差距更大有关。该分析是描述性的而非因果性的，但它表明，夫妻间的性别不平等不仅体现在所完成的工作量上，还体现在真正自由支配时间的分配上。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性较强，方法规范，实证较扎实，影响力较大，可读性较好，但方法论上未采用前沿技术。
papers.summary: 揭示了意大利年轻家庭中性别不平等在时间分配上的表现及影响因素。

papers.title: Deepbullwhip: An Open-Source Simulation and Benchmarking for Multi-Echelon Bullwhip Analyses
papers.abstract: The bullwhip effect remains operationally persistent despite decades of analytical research. Two computational deficiencies hinder progress: the absence of modular open-source simulation tools for multi-echelon inventory dynamics with asymmetric costs, and the lack of a standardized benchmarking protocol for comparing mitigation strategies across shared metrics and datasets. This paper introduces deepbullwhip, an open-source Python package that integrates a simulation engine for serial supply chains (with pluggable demand generators, ordering policies, and cost functions via abstract base classes, and a vectorized Monte Carlo engine achieving 50 to 90 times speedup) with a registry-based benchmarking framework shipping a curated catalog of ordering policies, forecasting methods, six bullwhip metrics, and demand datasets including WSTS semiconductor billings. Five sets of experiments on a four-echelon semiconductor chain demonstrate cumulative amplification of 427x (Monte Carlo mean across 1,000 paths), a stochastic filtering phenomenon at upstream tiers (CV = 0.01), super-exponential lead time sensitivity, and scalability to 20.8 million simulation cells in under 7 seconds. Benchmark experiments reveal a 155x disparity between synthetic AR(1) and real WSTS bullwhip severity under the Order-Up-To policy, and quantify the BWR-NSAmp tradeoff across ordering policies, demonstrating that no single metric captures policy quality.
papers.chineseTitle: 深度牛鞭效应：多级牛鞭效应分析的开源模拟与基准测试
papers.chineseAbstract: 尽管经过数十年的分析研究，牛鞭效应在运营中仍然持续存在。两个计算缺陷阻碍了进展：一是缺乏针对具有非对称成本的多级库存动态的模块化开源模拟工具，二是缺乏用于比较不同缓解策略的标准化基准测试协议，这些协议需基于共享指标和数据集。本文介绍了deepbullwhip，这是一个开源的Python软件包，它将一个用于串行供应链的模拟引擎（通过抽象基类实现可插拔的需求生成器、订购策略和成本函数，以及一个实现50至90倍加速的向量化蒙特卡洛引擎）与一个基于注册表的基准测试框架相结合，该框架提供了一个精选的订购策略目录、预测方法、六种牛鞭效应指标以及包括WSTS半导体账单在内的需求数据集。在四层半导体供应链上进行的五组实验表明，累计放大效应达到427倍（1000条路径的蒙特卡洛平均值），上游层级出现随机过滤现象（CV=0.01），超指数级前置时间敏感性，以及在不到7秒内扩展到2080万个模拟单元的能力。基准测试实验揭示了在订购至上限策略下，合成AR(1)与真实WSTS牛鞭效应严重程度之间存在155倍的差异，并量化了不同订购策略下的BWR-NSAmp权衡，表明没有单一指标能够全面捕捉策略质量。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的开源工具和基准测试框架，创新性显著；方法论严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱。
papers.summary: 提出开源工具deepbullwhip，用于多级牛鞭效应的模拟与基准测试。

papers.title: Daycare Matching with Siblings: Social Implementation and Welfare Evaluation
papers.abstract: In centralized assignment problems, agents may have preferences over joint rather than individual assignments, such as couples in residency matching or siblings in school choice and daycare. Standard preference estimation methods typically ignore such complementarities. This paper develops an empirical framework that explicitly incorporates them. Using data from daycare assignment in a municipality in Japan, we estimate a model in which families incur both additional commuting distance and a fixed non-distance disutility when siblings are assigned to different facilities. We find that split assignment generates a large disutility, equivalent to more than twice the average commuting distance. We then simulate counterfactual assignment policies that vary the strength of sibling priority and evaluate welfare. The sibling priority reform that we designed and that was implemented in 2024 increases welfare by 6.4% while reducing inequality in assignment rates across sibling groups; models that ignore sibling complementarities substantially understate these gains. At the same time, we uncover a clear efficiency-equity tradeoff: along the frontier, increasing mean welfare by 100 meters is associated with an increase in inequality of about 1.7 percentage points, and the welfare-maximizing policy reverses much of the reform's reduction in inequality, largely through the displacement of households without siblings.
papers.chineseTitle: 有兄弟姐妹的日托匹配：社会实施与福利评估
papers.chineseAbstract: 在集中分配问题中，代理人可能对联合分配而非个体分配有偏好，例如住院医生匹配中的夫妇或学校选择和日托中的兄弟姐妹。标准的偏好估计方法通常忽略这种互补性。本文开发了一个明确纳入这些互补性的实证框架。利用日本某市日托分配的数据，我们估计了一个模型，其中当兄弟姐妹被分配到不同设施时，家庭既要承担额外的通勤距离，又要承担固定的非距离负效用。我们发现，分开分配会产生很大的负效用，相当于平均通勤距离的两倍以上。然后，我们模拟了不同强度的兄弟姐妹优先权的反事实分配政策，并评估了福利。我们设计并于2024年实施的兄弟姐妹优先权改革使福利提高了6.4%，同时减少了兄弟姐妹群体间分配率的不平等；忽略兄弟姐妹互补性的模型大大低估了这些收益。同时，我们发现了一个明显的效率与公平的权衡：在前沿上，平均福利每增加100米，不平等就会增加约1.7个百分点，而福利最大化政策在很大程度上通过取代没有兄弟姐妹的家庭，逆转了改革所减少的大部分不平等。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在日托匹配中引入了兄弟姐妹互补性，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱。
papers.summary: 考虑兄弟姐妹互补性的日托匹配政策显著提高了福利并减少了不平等。

papers.title: Mapping the causal structure of price formation in Texas's transitioning electricity market
papers.abstract: Electricity markets are changing, driven by large-scale renewable integration and rising demand from electrification and digitalisation. This raises fundamental questions about how electricity prices form as the relationships among key price determinants evolve. Here we apply causal discovery to characterise these dynamics across major supply- and demand-side drivers of wholesale electricity prices in Texas, where rapid renewable growth intersects with surging demand. We show that wind generation has become the dominant causal driver of day-ahead electricity prices with effects more than 3 times larger than those of natural gas prices, overturning the view of the Texas market as gas-price-driven. Wind reduces prices locally but redistributes congestion costs across regions in seasonally varying patterns. Natural gas prices remain causally relevant, though their influence is modest and the dominant gas benchmark changes over time. Electricity demand also shows region- and period-specific causal effects. These findings highlight the need for causal models that capture time-varying relationships across both supply and demand to guide system planners and market participants navigating the ongoing transition.
papers.chineseTitle: 得克萨斯州转型中电力市场价格形成因果结构的映射
papers.chineseAbstract: 受大规模可再生能源整合以及电气化和数字化需求增长的推动，电力市场正在发生变化。这引发了关于电力价格如何形成的基本问题，因为关键价格决定因素之间的关系正在演变。本文应用因果发现方法，对得克萨斯州批发电力价格的主要供应和需求驱动因素之间的动态关系进行表征。在得克萨斯州，可再生能源的快速增长与激增的需求相互交织。研究显示，风力发电已成为日前电力价格的主要因果驱动因素，其影响超过天然气价格的三倍，颠覆了得克萨斯州市场由天然气价格驱动的观点。风力发电在局部降低价格，但以季节性变化模式在各地区重新分配拥堵成本。天然气价格仍然具有因果相关性，但其影响较小，且主导的天然气基准随时间变化。电力需求也显示出特定地区和时期的因果效应。这些发现强调了需要因果模型来捕捉供需双方随时间变化的关系，以指导系统规划者和市场参与者应对正在进行的转型。
